notes: Specs confirmed from Panasonic Connect EU product page and ManualsLib page 204 spec table. SDI IN supports SD-SDI, HD-SDI, and 3G-SDI (grade sdi-3g). HDMI version not explicitly stated in spec; listed as HDCP/Deep Color compatible — grade hdmi-1.4 is the safe minimum (likely HDMI 1.4). DIGITAL LINK/LAN is a single RJ-45 port supporting HDBaseT plus 100Base-TX Ethernet, Art-Net, PJLink. RGB 1 IN uses 5× BNC connectors (R/Pr/VIDEO, G/Y, B/Pb/C, SYNC/HD, VD) for composite/component/RGB. Power inlet is IEC C13 based on the detachable 3-pin AC power cord described in the manual for an 825W projector — not explicitly labeled as C13 in the retrieved spec pages. No USB ports. Discontinued August 2021.

ports.name: HDMI IN
ports.note: HDMI 19-pin, HDCP compatible, Deep Color compatible. HDMI version not explicitly stated; grade inferred as 1.4 minimum.

ports.name: DVI-D IN
ports.note: DVI-D 24-pin single link, DVI 1.0 compliant, HDCP compatible.

ports.name: SDI IN
ports.note: BNC x1, SD-SDI / HD-SDI / 3G-SDI compliant. PT-RZ770 and PT-RZ660 only.

ports.name: RGB 1 IN
ports.note: BNC x5 (R/Pr/VIDEO, G/Y, B/Pb/C, SYNC/HD, VD). Accepts RGB, YPbPr/YCbCr, Y/C, and composite video signals.

ports.name: RGB 2 IN
ports.note: D-sub HD 15-pin female. Accepts RGB, YPbPr/YCbCr, SYNC/HD/VD signals.

ports.name: DIGITAL LINK/LAN
ports.note: Single RJ-45 port. Supports HDBaseT (uncompressed HD video + control over CAT5e/6 STP), 100Base-TX Ethernet, Art-Net, PJLink Class 1, HDCP, Deep Color.

ports.name: SERIAL/MULTI PROJECTOR SYNC IN
ports.note: D-sub 9-pin female. RS-232C compliant. Used for serial control and multi-projector sync (contrast balance / shutter sync).

ports.name: SERIAL/MULTI PROJECTOR SYNC OUT
ports.note: D-sub 9-pin male. RS-232C compliant. Daisy-chain output for multi-projector sync.

ports.name: REMOTE 2 IN
ports.note: D-sub 9-pin female. Contact/parallel external control input.

ports.name: REMOTE 1 IN
ports.note: M3 stereo mini jack. Wired remote control input.

ports.name: REMOTE 1 OUT
ports.note: M3 stereo mini jack. Wired remote link output for projector chaining.

ports.name: AC IN
ports.note: IEC C13 inlet. Detachable 3-pin grounding AC power cord, 100–240 V, 50/60 Hz, 825 W. Supplied cord is 3.0 m. IEC C13 inferred from power class and cord description; not explicitly labeled in retrieved spec pages.
